reviews.comment:
Paramos siempre a comprar el sándwich especial de crudo, queso y manteca la otra opción es de matambre casero y queso. Especiales!!!

(Translated by Google)
We always stop to buy the special sandwich with ham, cheese, and butter; the other option is homemade flank steak and cheese. Special!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURodnZXTW1RRRAB

reviews.comment:
Tuve un problema con mi auto y desinteresadamente me ahudo el Sr Miranda y dos de sus compañeros. Eternamente agradecido !

(Translated by Google)
I had a problem with my car, and Mr. Miranda and two of his colleagues selflessly helped me. I'm eternally grateful!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURoM3Bla21BRRAB

reviews.comment:
Atencion,pulcritud,en todo., una parada inevitable

(Translated by Google)
Attention, cleanliness, in everything. An unmissable stop.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURoM3Y3MmR3EAE

reviews.comment:
Gracias por la ayuda al ACA. Se había muerto la batería y con mucho gusto nos dio arranque para poder llegar.
Los de la estación de servicio se hicieron como que no podían ayudar y no había nadie cargando nafta en ese momento.

(Translated by Google)
Thanks to the ACA for the help. Our battery had died, and they kindly gave us a jump start so we could get there.
The people at the gas station acted like they couldn't help, and there was no one filling up at the time.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURoM3NqTkdREAE

reviews.comment:
Tanto aqui como en Samborombon, imposible conseguir factura A. Alguien deberia tomar cartas en el asunto. Estando en viaje no hay tiempo de discutir con el empleado, quien muy amablemente tiene que explicar sus limitaciones

(Translated by Google)
Both here and in Samborombon, it's impossible to get an invoice. Someone should look into this. When you're traveling, there's no time to argue with the employee, who very politely has to explain their limitations.
